song.title: Could This Be It?
song.albumTitle: Swipe Me to the Moon (A Gay Musical)
song.description: Full lyrics to 'Could This Be It?' from Swipe Me to the Moon (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: Could This Be It? Lyrics - Swipe Me to the Moon
og.description: Full lyrics to 'Could This Be It?' from Swipe Me to the Moon (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

twitter.title: Could This Be It? Lyrics - Swipe Me to the Moon
twitter.description: Full lyrics to 'Could This Be It?' from Swipe Me to the Moon (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia. Track 5 of 22 from the groundbreaking gay dating musical.

essay: Could This Be It? is the first real spark of possibility after playful app chaos. It stages the fragile moment where attraction starts to feel like meaningful connection.
song.lyricsHtml:
Hold up did I just get a match
Is this real did the stars just hatch
He's not a creep he typed with care
And oh my god is that facial hair
He said hey handsome then asked what I like
No eggplant emoji no thirst trap spike

He spelled out you and said I seem sweet
Is this a date or a divine treat
Could this be it could this be real
Not a red flag not a dirty deal
Could this be fate could this be true
He asked what's your favorite color
Who does that do

Okay okay what do I wear
My nice white tee or the see through pair
Do I play it cool or full on gay
Wait he has a dog should I bake a souffle
Could this be joy could this be me
Getting a chance to just be seen

No weird demands no shirtless jerk
He just wants to know where I work
He wants to know your job he said
Your smile made him thrive
He said hey handsome then asked what I like
No eggplant emoji no thirst trap spike
He spelled out you and said I seem sweet
Is this a date or a divine treat

Could this be fate could this be true
Not a red flag not a dirty deal
Could this be fate could this be true
He asked what's your favorite color
Who does that do
Who does that do

Would this be joy could this be me
Getting a chance to just be seen
No weird demands no shirtless jerk
He just wants to know where I work
He wants to know your job he said
Your smile made him thrive
He said he likes your nerdy tone
He didn't ask if you're alone

Could this be it the love parade
Girl it's your turn the app God's made way
I'll scream from the roof I'll text all my friends
I might have a boyfriend by the weekend
We'll meet at a cafe I'll sip like I'm shy
He'll laugh I'll melt I'll forget how to lie

And when he smiles I'll say it back
I can't believe I found you on this crack of an app
Just this once please let it be real
Not another maybe not another steal
Please let him be kind not just hot
Let this be love or at least a damn good shot

Could this be it could this be him
Not a torso not a gym rat will
He's kinda sweet I'm kinda shook
I'd even read his poetry book

Could this be joy
Could this be fate
No midnight planning a date
For once I'm not faking my smile is wide
Could this be the start of my gay little ride
Please let him show up
